title: Replace Internet Identity admin auth with hardcoded password access control

requirements.summary: Replace Internet Identity authentication on /admin with hardcoded password prompt and session-based access control
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin no longer triggers Internet Identity login
A password prompt UI is shown when accessing /admin without an active admin session
Entering the correct hardcoded password grants access to the admin panel tabs (Books and Orders)
Entering an incorrect password shows a visible error message and does not grant access
Admin session persists for the duration of the browser session (sessionStorage or React state) so the user is not re-prompted unnecessarily
The rest of the application (catalog, checkout, order history, cart) is unaffected

file_operations.description: Create a new password prompt component that displays a centered form with a password input field, submit button, and error message display. On submission, compare the entered password against a hardcoded value (e.g., 'admin123'). If correct, call a callback prop to grant access; if incorrect, show an error message below the input field.

Remove the Internet Identity-based admin role check and isCallerAdmin backend call. Replace the authentication logic with a password-based session check using sessionStorage (key: 'adminAuthenticated'). When the component mounts, check if sessionStorage has 'adminAuthenticated' set to 'true'. If not, render the PasswordPromptScreen component instead of the admin tabs. When the password prompt succeeds, set sessionStorage 'adminAuthenticated' to 'true' and update local state to show the admin panel. If the user is not password-authenticated, do not render BooksManagementTab or OrdersManagementTab. Keep the Tabs UI structure intact for authenticated sessions.

requirements.summary: Remove Internet Identity principal-based admin role check from AdminPanelPage
acceptanceCriteria: AdminPanelPage no longer calls any Internet Identity or principal-based admin role check
The admin panel is accessible purely by entering the correct hardcoded password
No Internet Identity login prompt appears when accessing /admin

file_operations.description: Remove all imports and usages of useIsCallerAdmin hook and the isCallerAdmin query. Remove any logic that checks identity or principal to determine admin access. Ensure AccessDeniedScreen is no longer rendered based on Internet Identity checks; instead, only render PasswordPromptScreen when the password session is not active. Do not reference Internet Identity login in any error messages or UI text.

Update the AccessDeniedScreen component text and UI to reflect that it is now only used for cases where the password has not been entered (if still used), rather than for Internet Identity-based authorization failures. If this component is no longer referenced after REQ-1 and REQ-2 changes, this operation ensures it does not mention Internet Identity login in its messaging.
